creator: vanderh@ecf.utoronto.ca
text:
On Sat, May 22, 1999 at 04:31:48AM -0400, Bill Fenner wrote:
> 
> I thought that the configure script complains if you give it a --with-wish
> that doesn't exist; it doesn't, but it will still build and install a
> non-working wordview.  I guess this is not too bad.

I would hardly classify wordview as essential to catdoc.  It's more
like a handy add-on.  Kinda "Oh hey.  If I have X installed, I can do
this, too."  Nifty, but unnecessary.  So yes, it is not too bad.  :-)


-- 
This .sig is not innovative, witty, or profund.
